message:
feat(search): migrate embedder stack dispatch with tiered fallback (B3 milestone)

Add ManagedEmbedderStack with Quality→Fast→Hash fallback, EmbedderDispatch
config, and availability metrics to SearchOrchestrator. 47 tests pass (22 existing + 25 new B3).

Closes ft-dr6zv.1.3.4
